title: A Dirty Meeting
content: You track Miller's unmarked car to a basement casino in Camden. Staying in the shadows, you watch him meet a man in a gray, oil-stained utility jacket.||Because of the description the Dealer gave you at the docks, you recognize the man immediately. He's one of 'The Cleaners'.||Miller looks terrified, handing over a small package. He's not just taking bribes from the elite; he's paying off debts to the street muscle. They own him.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Miller's link to The Cleaners confirmed.
